item.title: Guangdong Zonegoing Food Co., LTD: 52USA brand POPPING BOBA; MANGO FLAVOR; Net wt: 7 lb (3.2kg); Recall
item.product: 52USA brand POPPING BOBA; MANGO FLAVOR; Net wt: 7 lb (3.2kg);
item.summary: Products contain unapproved colors, specifically tartrazine (FD&C Yellow 5), sunset yellow (FD&C Yellow 6), and allura red (FD&C Red 40). Product details: 52USA brand POPPING BOBA; MANGO FLAVOR; Net wt: 7 lb (3.2kg); Ingredients Drinking water, fructose syrup, food additives (hydroxypropyl distarch phosphate (E1442), calcium lactate (E327), DL-malic acid (E296), sodium alginate (E401), citric acid (E330), carrag...
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
